content: Sprint 7.1 — Batch trivial ✅ (10 fichiers : Landing, ConfirmDialog, Hero, Manifesto, FAQ, BrutalTruth, Mission, Socials, Tokenomics, GlitchOverlay)
Sprint 7.3 — Batch wrappers ✅ (8 fichiers : TopNav, TransparencyTimeline, ActivityHeatmap, ProphetPinnedWhisper, Whitelist, PropheciesFeed, Roadmap, BackgroundProject)
Sprint 7.4 — Batch complexe ✅ (ProphetChat, ROISimulator, ClassifiedVault wrappers, Operation, HowToBuy, PublicStats, DeepStateIntro, TwoFASetupDialog, etc.)
Sprint 7.5 — Validation ✅ : tsc 0 errors + yarn build prod clean + smoke E2E 0 page errors
Bonus — Shadcn shim refondu (top-level import retiré → ambient module re-fonctionnel)
